summary: Add a constrained graphical approval-flow configurator, split special timesheet projects into their own approval template, and promote organization configuration into a full-width configuration page.

notes: Removed special_department_owner from normal PM, CC, and PMCC approval templates.
Kept LEAVE / special timesheet project blocks routed to the independent department-owner confirmation template.
Expanded psa_save_approval_template so approval_config writers can add, remove, reorder, and save template nodes with server-side validation and sequential edge rebuilding.
Updated timesheet approval-chain projection so runtime-only special template nodes remain visible in mixed timesheets.
Replaced the approval-flow field editor with a constrained graphical configurator: template list, flow canvas, node inspector, validation, add/delete, drag reorder, save, and restore.
Shows business Chinese labels first and keeps raw node/resolver keys in a collapsed advanced section.
Moved organization configuration into its own tab with a department tree and detail panel.
Updated department color candidates and compact color editing.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.20.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.20.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.20.
known_warnings: Existing running approval instances keep their historical graph even if current data-driven template selection has changed.
Vite may still warn that some chunks are larger than 500 kB.
